title: RangeRequest
description: Request to retrieve a range of key-value pairs from the etcd cluster

key.description: The first key in the range in base64-encoded format

range_end.description: The upper bound of the range in base64-encoded format (exclusive). If not specified, only the key is retrieved. If set to key plus one byte, all keys with the given prefix are retrieved.

limit.description: Maximum number of key-value pairs to return. 0 means no limit.

revision.description: Point-in-time revision for the query. 0 means the current revision.

serializable.description: When true, uses serializable (stale) reads for higher throughput. When false (default), uses linearizable reads for strong consistency.

keys_only.description: When true, returns only keys without values

count_only.description: When true, returns only the count without the key-value pairs

min_mod_revision.description: Filter for keys with mod_revision greater than or equal to this value

max_mod_revision.description: Filter for keys with mod_revision less than or equal to this value

min_create_revision.description: Filter for keys with create_revision greater than or equal to this value

max_create_revision.description: Filter for keys with create_revision less than or equal to this value
